reviews.comment: My experience at Coastal Carolina CPR was excellent. I had some questions about how to renew my certifications using the hybrid method and they were right there to answer my questions. When it came to the skills visit, my instructor was ready and waiting for me. The environment was all profession. I had none of that anxiety I have experienced in the past while renewing. It was such a professional and collegial experience.  I would recommend Coastal Carolina CPR to anyone!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, Maureen.  We are pleased to hear your experience was as you expected.  We look forward to working with you for years to come.  Have a wonderful Summer!

reviews.comment: This class was very informative and hands on which made the experience a 10/10. Would highly recommend to any individual wanting to get cpr certified! Their hours are great as well so I was able to take the class within a couple days of signing up! Super convenient :)

reviews.comment: I went to the satellite branch, in Holly Ridge, for the skills portion of HeartCode BLS. You demonstrate the skills and you are on your way. They are knowledgeable and friendly, equipment is up to date with responsive manikins. They are also fast at getting out the eCard for your BLS certification.
